title: ebenus cappadocica
intro: Ebenus cappadocica, also known as the caper spurge, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Ebenus cappadocica include relief from joint pain, skin irritations, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Ebenus cappadocica include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
